case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. ROBERT POMON

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT POMON, ROBERT SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-21-2011
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED JAN-02-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT POMON, ROBERT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $4,380.36 AS TO DEFENDANT POMON, ROBERT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $284.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT POMON, ROBERT
DECLARATION JANALIE HENRIQUES FILED RE: INTEREST, COSTS (CCP 1033) AND ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POMON, ROBERT $3,856.79 PRINCIPAL, $284.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,140.79, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT POMON, ROBERT
DECLARATION DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
